title: [Spider Temple, Cell]
description: A small cot, shoved hastily in the corner, provides the captive's only refuge:  slumber.  Several pairs of well-tended manacles are chained from the basalt walls, which are hard and unforgiving, enduring in their silent torture longer than the mercurial will of the gods.

wayto.25497: ;e begin; fput 'search'; search_result = waitfor 'don\'t find anything', 'the opening of an escape tunnel', 'nothing other than the tunnel', 'Roundtime:'; waitrt?; end until search_result =~ /tunnel/; move 'go tunnel'
